scoresSubcommand: Get the scores for a Counting channel!
ephemeralOption: Set to "True" to show the response only to you
numberOption: The number to set the channel to
purgeOption: Set to "True" to start completely fresh
alreadySetupError: This channel is already set up for counting! Mods can /reset or /end it!
notSetupError: This channel is not set up for counting!
notSetupYet: This command has not been setup yet!
noPermissionError: You do not have permission to use this command!
waitForGame: Please wait for the new game to start
tokenCooldownError: You can only count once every hour in the Token game!
newRecord:
**A new record of {{number}} was set by {{user}}**!
{{breaker}} will go down in history as the one who broke the streak...
hardcoreTimeout: They were timed out for 24 hours for this transgression!
tokenSteal: They stole {{tokens}} tokens from the pot!
normalEnding: Make sure to point and laugh at them!
paydayDesc:
The pot of {{total}} tokens has been claimed by {{users}} users!
Each user has been given {{perUser}} tokens!

The pot grows bigger the higher the combo gets, and the amount of people who have contributed to the combo!
welcomeToken: This is a TOKEN game: Build the pot and get tokens every 10 levels, or break the combo and steal it all!
welcomeHardcore: This is a HARDCORE game: if you break the combo you will be timed out for 24 hours!
newPlayerWarningBase:
Hey {{name}}, welcome to the counting game!

You may not know, but you're breaking the combo!

The current number is {{number}}, if you want to join the game, type the next number in the series!
newPlayerWarningHardcore: If you break the combo again, you'll be timed out for 24 hours!
newPlayerWarningToken: If you break the combo again, you'll steal {{tokens}} tokens and reset the counter for everyone else!
newPlayerWarningNormal: If you break the combo again, you'll reset the combo!
setupRules:
The rules are simple:
1. You must post a number in chat that is 1 higher than the last number.
2. You must use numbers, I'm not smart enough to understand words can be numbers.
3. You can't count twice in a row.
hardcoreRule:
This is a HARDCORE game which means:
4. If you say the wrong number the count resets and **you will be timed out for 24!**
tokenRule:
This is a TOKEN game which means:
4. Every time someone counts, tokens are added to the pot
5. At every multiple of 10 (10, 20, 30, etc) everyone who contributed gets a share from the pot
6. At any point someone can break the combo and take the pot for themselves!
normalRule: 4. If you say the wrong number the count resets and everyone will be disappointed
setupFooter:
Use /counting scores to see the scores for this channel

Mods can /counting reset to reset the channel if needed

I'll start us off in the next message!
